content: طول ما إنتَ بِتِروح اِلشُغل، هايبقى مَعَك فِلوس
translations: eng:as long as you go to work, you will have money

transcriptions.arabizi: tool ma 'inta bitirooh ilshughl, haeyib'a maAa|ak filoos
